law: This sample code project shows how to use Core NFC in an app to read Near Field Communication (NFC) tags of types 1 through 5 that contains NFC Data Exchange Format (NDEF) data.
To use this sample, download the project and build it using Xcode.
Turn on Near Field Communication Tag Reading under the Capabilities tab for the project’s target (see ).
The dispatch queue to use when calling methods on the delegate.
The reader session requires a delegate object that conforms to the protocol.
This session must be active to write an NDEF message to the tag, so this time, is set to , preventing the session from becoming invalid after reading the tag.
